business_definition: A deterministic evaluation result emitted when a Vellum rule is run against one or more canonical contract records.

fields.rule_result_id: Stable identifier for the rule evaluation result.
fields.rule_id: Identifier of the rule that was evaluated.
fields.rule_version: Version of the rule that was evaluated.
fields.evaluation_status: Indicates whether evaluation completed successfully, errored, or was skipped.
fields.triggered: Whether the rule condition was met.
fields.severity: Severity classification on the emitted result.
fields.materiality: Materiality classification or band for the result.
fields.result_code: Deterministic result code emitted by the rule.
fields.result_type: Outcome classification of the rule result.
fields.target_contract_ids: Canonical contract record identifiers evaluated by the rule.
fields.evaluated_at: Timestamp when the rule was executed.
fields.evidence_snapshot: Structured evidence captured at evaluation time for auditability and explanation.
fields.explanation: Deterministic or templated explanation of the result.
fields.created_exception_id: Exception created from this result, if any.
fields.created_reconciliation_break_id: Reconciliation break created from this result, if any.
fields.created_workflow_case_id: Workflow case opened from this result, if any.
fields.created_approval_request_id: Approval request created from this result, if any.
